fields.label: TIMESTAMP
fields.help: When the audit event occurred (FileMan date/time).

fields.label: USER NUMBER
fields.help: The acting principal's #200 IEN (DUZ); 0 = system context.

fields.label: HOST
fields.help: The originating host/device ($IO), up to 80 characters.

fields.label: DETAIL
fields.help: Free-text event detail, up to 245 characters.

parameterDefinitions.name: VPNG GREETING
parameterDefinitions.displayText: VPNG greeting (read by VPNG via $$get^VSLCFG at SYS)
